languages.text: {n}Ваши пальцы сжимаются на металле аугмента, и вы чуть тянете его на себя. С сухим хрустом старые кости мертвеца ломаются, и вы осторожно вытаскиваете имплант из переплетения корней.{/n}
{n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши пальцы сжимаются на металле аугмента, и вы чуть тянете его на себя. С сухим хрустом старые кости мертвеца ломаются, и вы осторожно вытаскиваете имплант из переплетения корней.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}
{n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}
{n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}

languages.text: {n}指で増幅器の金属を掴み、少しだけ引き寄せた。死者の骨は乾いた音と共に砕け、根の絡まりから増幅器を優しく引き抜いた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 指で増幅器の金属を掴み、少しだけ引き寄せた。死者の骨は乾いた音と共に砕け、根の絡まりから増幅器を優しく引き抜いた。

languages.text: {n}Parmakların, ogmentin metalini kavrıyor. Onu hafifçe kendine doğru çekiyorsun. Cesedin eski kemikleri, kuru bir çatırtıyla kırılıyor. İmplantı nazikçe kök yumağının içinden çekip alıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Parmakların, ogmentin metalini kavrıyor. Onu hafifçe kendine doğru çekiyorsun. Cesedin eski kemikleri, kuru bir çatırtıyla kırılıyor. İmplantı nazikçe kök yumağının içinden çekip alıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus dedos se cierran en torno al metal del aumento y tiras levemente de él hacia ti. Los huesos viejos del cadáver se rompen con un crujido seco y, con cuidado, sacas el implante de la maraña de raíces.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus dedos se cierran en torno al metal del aumento y tiras levemente de él hacia ti. Los huesos viejos del cadáver se rompen con un crujido seco y, con cuidado, sacas el implante de la maraña de raíces.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你用手指扣住植入物的金属部分，将其缓缓拉向你。枯骨发出脆响，应声而断。你将植入物从纠缠的树根中轻轻抽出。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你用手指扣住植入物的金属部分，将其缓缓拉向你。枯骨发出脆响，应声而断。你将植入物从纠缠的树根中轻轻抽出。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vos doigts se referment sur le métal de l'augmentation, que vous tirez légèrement vers vous. Les os friables du cadavre se brisent dans un craquement sec, puis vous libérez prudemment l'implant de l'enchevêtrement de racines.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos doigts se referment sur le métal de l'augmentation, que vous tirez légèrement vers vous. Les os friables du cadavre se brisent dans un craquement sec, puis vous libérez prudemment l'implant de l'enchevêtrement de racines.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Finger schließen sich um das Metall der Augmentation und du ziehst sie sanft in deine Richtung. Die alten Knochen des Leichnams brechen, als du das Implantat vorsichtig aus dem Gewirr aus Wurzeln ziehst.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}
